title: Tests — dominance algorithm, queue persistence, API endpoints, UI smoke test
task: Create tests/historyAnalysisService.test.js (hist-1–hist-5), tests/pendingReviewService.test.js (queue-1–queue-4). Update tests/resolveCategory.test.js stubs to include confidence field in classify() return. Run full bash tests/run-tests.sh green.
acceptance: hist-1-no-transactions: empty array → { dominantCategory: null, insufficientData: true }
hist-2-below-min-count: 5 categorized tx → { dominantCategory: null, insufficientData: true }
hist-3-below-threshold: 100 tx, 65% dominance → { dominantCategory: 'X', belowThreshold: true }
hist-4-above-threshold: 100 tx, 85% dominance → { dominantCategory: 'X', dominance: 0.85, confidence: 0.85 }
queue-4-duplicate-check: addReview() same transactionId → returns existing
resolveCategory.test.js 4/4 cases still pass with confidence field in stubs
bash tests/run-tests.sh exits 0 with all tests passing
